strengths: Consistent EN/ES structural parity across all 9 pairs with matching headings, link counts, and navigation anchors (quick, validation, troubleshooting, next step)
Strong interlink density (7–12 internal links per doc) with contextually appropriate targets spanning tutorials, references, and how-to guides
gaps: Several ES headings retain English terms untranslated (e.g., 'Troubleshooting', 'Health Checks', 'Quick View' → 'Vista rapida' inconsistently capitalized), signaling incomplete localization polish
deploy-to-production.md lacks a dedicated 'Related links' / 'Next step' footer section in its heading list, breaking the structural contract the other 8 pairs follow
fixes: Standardize all ES headings: replace bare 'Troubleshooting' with 'Resolución de problemas' or 'Solución de problemas' (contributing.md already does this — replicate across all pairs)
Add explicit 'Siguiente paso' and 'Enlaces relacionados' headings to both deploy-to-production variants to match the section template used by all other pairs
